query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Axiom', 'A self-evident truth requiring no proof', 'Her axiom became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Baize', 'A woollen fabric resembling felt', 'The essay highlights the baize of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bale', 'A large, wrapped bundle of something (ie, cotton, hay)', 'Scholars noted a striking bale between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Baleful', 'Threatening harm, menacing', 'The passage presents a baleful portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Balk', 'To pass over or by', 'The author hoped the new policy would balk tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ballast', 'Any heavy material used to stabilize a ship', 'Over time, the community learned to ballast its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Balsam', 'A sweet-smelling oil or resin derived from various plants', 'Her balsam became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Banal', 'Lacking originality or freshness; trite and commonplace', 'Her banal became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bandy', 'To give and receive reciprocally, to exchange', 'The author hoped the new policy would bandy tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bane', 'A cause of great distress or annoyance', 'Her bane became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Banter', 'The playful and friendly exchange of teasing remarks', 'The essay highlights the banter of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bar', 'Except fro, apart from', 'Her bar became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Barb', 'A sharp projection near the end of an arrow or similar item', 'Scholars noted a striking barb between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Barcarole', 'A venetian folk song traditionally sung by gondoliers', 'Scholars noted a striking barcarole between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bard', 'A poet, often one who plays an instrument', 'Her bard became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Baritone', 'The male voice between tenor and bass', 'Her baritone became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Barograph', 'A recording aneroid barometer', 'The essay highlights the barograph of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Barometer', 'An instrument for measuring atmospheric pressure', 'The essay highlights the barometer of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Barrage', 'To bombard someone with something', 'Over time, the community learned to barrage its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Barrister', 'A lawyer who pleads in court', 'Scholars noted a striking barrister between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Barterer', 'One who trades goods for other goods without involving money', 'The essay highlights the barterer of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Basaltic', 'Related to volcanic rock or lava', '“The island was covered in basaltic formations created by ancient lava flows.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bashful', 'Shy, inclined to avoid notice', 'The author hoped the new policy would bashful tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bask', 'To revel in, to lie exposed to warmth and light', 'Over time, the community learned to bask its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bass', 'Of sound which is low in pitch or frequency', 'Scholars noted a striking bass between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Baste', 'To sew with long, loose stitches', 'Scholars noted a striking baste between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bastion', 'A stronghold or defense', 'Her bastion became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Baton', 'A short stick or staff used to conduct', 'Critics argued that the plan might baton the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Battalion', 'A large body of troop ready for battle', 'The essay highlights the battalion of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Batten', 'To become better, improve in condition', 'Critics argued that the plan might batten the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Battery', 'A fortified emplacement for heavy guns', 'Scholars noted a striking battery between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bauble', 'A cheap showy ornament piece of jewellery, a gewgaw', 'Her bauble became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bawdy', 'Soiled, dirty', 'Scholars noted a striking bawdy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bawl', 'To shout or utter in a loud and intense manner', 'The author hoped the new policy would bawl tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Beam', 'To emit beams of light, shine, radiate,', 'Critics argued that the plan might beam the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Beatific', 'Blessed, blissful, heavenly', 'Her beatific became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Beatify', 'To make blissful', 'Critics argued that the plan might beatify the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Beatitude', 'Supreme, utmost bliss and happiness', 'The essay highlights the beatitude of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
